sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Check what changed after DOWN
before = last_transition.before_frame.segmentation
after = current_frame.segmentation

print("After DOWN - all nodes:")
for n in after['nodes']:
    print(f"  id={n['id']} color={n['color']} pixels={n['pixels']} boundary={n['boundary']}")

# Compare white character position
before_w = [n for n in before['nodes'] if n['color'] == 'W' and n['pixels'] > 100]
after_w = [n for n in after['nodes'] if n['color'] == 'W' and n['pixels'] > 100]
if before_w and after_w:
    print(f"\nWhite char before DOWN: {before_w[0]['boundary']}")
    print(f"White char after DOWN:  {after_w[0]['boundary']}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>

sections.label: THINKING
sections.content:
DOWN worked! The character moved down by 3 rows:
- Before: rows 11-25 → After: rows 14-28
- Feet before: rows 26-28 → After: rows 29-31
So DOWN also moves 3 rows. The character is now at rows 14-28 (body) and 29-31 (feet).
The door opening is at rows 32-46, cols 44-46. The character's feet are now at rows 29-31, which is just above the door opening (starts at row 32).
But the character is at cols 26-40, and the door opening is at cols 44-46. The character needs to move RIGHT more to align with the door.
Wait, but there are obstacles at cols 38-40. The character's right edge is at col 40, which overlaps with the obstacles. Let me check if the character can still move RIGHT.
Actually, looking at the boundaries more carefully:
- Character right edge: col 40 (from boundary)
- Obstacles: cols 38-40
The character might be partially overlapping with the obstacles. But the obstacles are at rows 35-37 and 41-43, while the character is at rows 14-28 (body) and 29-31 (feet). So the character is ABOVE the obstacles vertically. They don't collide!
Let me try RIGHT again to see if the character can move further right.

sections.label: ASSISTANT
sections.content:
World model (updated):
- DOWN moves character +3 rows. Character now at rows 14-28 (body), 29-31 (feet).
- Character at cols 26-40, needs to reach cols 44-46 (door opening).
- Obstacles at rows 35-37 and 41-43 don't block character (character is above them).
- Timer continues shrinking (29 pixels).
